creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I'd like to MFC some of my recent mmap() changes (specifically dealing with aligning addresses) to 9.  I have already tested that the nvidia-driver port still builds which I think was the most likely candidate to break.  The full patch for both userland and kernel is at http://people.FreeBSD.org/~jhb/patches/mmap_aligned_9.patch
